limits: External docs support design principles; final authority depends on local artifact validation.

source_evidence.applicability: supports pointer-lock validation and prompt-cartridge regression gates
source_evidence.claim: Prompt and agent changes need eval-backed regression checks; stored completions/evals can test prompt regressions.

source_evidence.applicability: supports new-chat contract and prompt-output-rule binding
source_evidence.claim: Prompts should use clear instructions, constraints, examples/context separation, and explicit output format.

source_evidence.applicability: supports portable prompt cartridge as an installed subsystem
source_evidence.claim: Reusable prompts can be versioned and invoked by ID/version rather than embedded ad hoc.

source_evidence.applicability: supports fresh-chat rehearsal and gate-based validation
source_evidence.claim: Agent workflows should be evaluated with traces/graders/datasets/eval runs to improve consistency and accuracy.
